Log:
  New port: graphics/py-rawkit

  rawkit (pronounced rocket) is a ctypes-based LibRaw binding for
  Python inspired by the Wand API.

  WWW: https://rawkit.readthedocs.org

  PR:		240601
  Submitted by:	m.ne@gmx.net
